examples: His rivals knew that they could expect no quarter from such a ruthless adversary.
Both of the wrestlers tried to tumble the adversary with all their strength.
The dictionary meaning of the term "opponent" is "adversary"; "enemy "; "one who opposes your interests".
But it may have also thrown down the gauntlet to a different adversary: Microsoft .
The adversary then responds to each allegation by admitting, denying or objecting to it.
